title: RETTACY College Ruled Notebook - 320 Numbered Pages Large B5 Lined Journal Notebook, 100gsm Thick Lined Paper, Faux Leather Softcover, for Women Men Work School,19 x 25 cm - Black
features: [320 Pages Thick Lined Journal] 160 sheets/320 pages, large B5 size 19 x 25 cm, 7mm space classic college ruled, gives you plenty of writing room to let your creativity flow freely without the fear of running out of room or trying to hurry and end the book.
[100GSM Quality Paper] RETTACY ruled journal adopts 100gsm thick paper, thicker 20% than normal, avoids ink bleeding through and feathering, and is suitable for most pens.

[Faux Leather Soft Cover] - The durable soft cover makes the notebooks more durable and touched comfortably and is easy to put into your bag. The durable cover will protect your journals for years and easily lay out flat for comfortable writing and reading.
[FEATURES] B5 Lined journal has 1 elastic band, 2 bookmarks,1 back expendable pocket, 1 free sticky note, and humanized rounded corner design.

[Great Use] Ideal for office, school, and home use, perfect as a personal writing journal, travel journal, business executives notebook, college course notebook, daily diary pad, bullet journal, and more. Best gifts for school, children, friends family, or business colleagues!
description: Product Description Why Choose RETTACY Softcover Lined Notebook? -Perfect A4&B5 size, the perfect size which is the most suitable for the Cornell Notes system. -enough pages with 160 sheets/320 pages There are enough pages for you to effectively record lectures and various notes for a year or more. -Each Journal comes with an Elastic Closure,2 Bookmarks,1 Back Pocket, and 2 Free Sticky Notes Dividers. -High-quality 100gsm thick lined paper, no bleeding through, and suitable for most types of pens. Products at a glance→ Go to the right for more information → 2 Bookmarks Bookmarks are more convenient and less damaging to the paper than folding books to register page numbers. 100GSM Premium Thick Paper Acid-free Paper with smooth touch,no bleeding through Faux Leather Soft Cover The durable soft cover to make the notebooks more durable and touched comfortably and is easy to put into your bag. 180° lay-flat Our Notebook has a 180° lay-flat binding that allows easy one-handed note-taking, and we have a careful and rigorous in-house bookbinding process to ensure our books can be used lifetime.
